title: Day 2 Revision — Self Introduction
keyPointsSummary: Name बताने के 5 तरीके: My name is / I am / I'm / People call me / You can call me
Origin बताने के 5 तरीके: I am from / I belong to / I come from / I was born in / I currently live in
Profession बताने के 5 तरीके: I work as a/an / I am a/an / I am working at / I am currently employed as / My profession is
Experience: I have been + verb+ing + for + time (Present Perfect Continuous)
Family: There are X people in my family / I have X siblings / My family consists of
Hobbies: I like/love/enjoy + verb+ing / I am passionate about / I am interested in
Greetings: Nice to meet you / Pleased to meet you / How do you do?
Common mistakes: 'I am belongs to' गलत, 'I belong to' सही; 'two year experience' गलत, 'two years of experience' सही
Phone introduction: 'This is [Name] speaking' — very common formal phone opener
Online meeting introduction: 'Hi everyone, I'm [Name], I'll be [role]'
LinkedIn/networking introduction focuses on job title + years of experience + interest
Group discussion introduction must be short (20-30 seconds): name + degree + one opinion
Formal tone avoids contractions ('I am' not 'I'm'); informal tone allows them
Avoid unnecessary words: 'good name', 'city' after a proper noun, missing articles before job titles

quickQuiz.question: Fix this sentence: 'I am belongs to Mumbai.'
Translate: मुझे किताबें पढ़ना पसंद है।
Fill: I have been ______ (work) here for two years.
Translate: मेरे परिवार में पाँच लोग हैं।
quickQuiz.answer: There are five people in my family.

quickQuiz.question: Correct: 'I have two year experience.'
quickQuiz.answer: I have two years of experience.

quickQuiz.question: Fix this sentence: 'My good name is Sunita.'
Fix this sentence: 'I am doing job in a company.'
Translate: मैं जल्दी सीखता हूँ और team में काम करना पसंद करता हूँ।
quickQuiz.answer: I am a quick learner and I enjoy working in a team.

quickQuiz.question: Translate: नमस्ते, मैं रोहन बोल रहा हूँ ABC Solutions से।
quickQuiz.answer: Hello, this is Rohan speaking from ABC Solutions.

quickQuiz.question: Fix this sentence: 'I am from Delhi city.'
Translate: क्या सभी को मेरी screen दिख रही है?
What is the correct pattern for stating experience? Fill: I have been ______ (work) here for two years.
Fix this sentence: 'I have two year experience.'
quickQuiz.answer: I have two years of experience.

quickQuiz.question: Translate: मैं अपना खुद का business चलाता हूँ।

mustRememberRules: Job titles से पहले article (a/an) ज़रूरी है — 'a teacher', 'an engineer'
'belong to' के साथ कभी 's' या 'am/is/are' नहीं लगाते जब subject 'I' हो — 'I belong to'
'years of experience' — दोनों words ज़रूरी हैं
like/love/enjoy के बाद verb में हमेशा -ing लगता है
On the phone, say 'This is [Name] speaking', not 'I am [Name] speaking'
Never say 'my good name is' — just 'my name is'
'Fresher' always needs an article: 'a fresher', not 'fresher'
Don't add 'city' after a place name that's already a city: 'I am from Delhi', not 'Delhi city'
